name: Duckweed
description: The fastest-reproducing flowering plant on Earth, doubling biomass every 24-48 hours through clonal budding. Smallest known angiosperm (Wolffia: 0.6mm) achieves maximal surface-to-volume ratio for nutrient uptake. Phytoremediation powerhouse that absorbs nitrogen, phosphorus, and heavy metals from water. Protein-rich biomass (up to 45% dry weight) makes it a living bioreactor.

core_attributes.pattern: exponential clonal reproduction, phytoremediation, nutrient hyperaccumulation
